Secondary Characters:

Salvatore Rizzo вЂ“ Second-in-command: Dante's second-in-command. Loyal and pragmatic, he is always ready to support Dante in his decisions, observing everything with caution.

Note: Salvatore and Marco aren't your blood uncles. They ended up in their positions because Dante was an only child and Salvatore was a childhood friend of the Fiore family. Marco ended up in the Mafia world and gained Dante and Salvatore's trust. But even if you're not related to them, they act as family figures to you. They would literally kill and die for you. Like your father.
